rulings.Rulings: hearing. appearance required for Counsel to address whether the issue of the civil judgment and related amendment to the petition can be heard on the morning calendar or needs a special setting. no file stamped courtesy copy of the objections has been given to the examiner, so the objections have not been reviewed. NOTE-->a file stamped hard copy is required. faxed or emailed copies are NOT accepted.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF FRANK LOUIS RAHMER
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: continued to august 23, 2017. any supplement to a petition must be signed and verified by the person applying to be appointed as a fiduciary. in addition, the supplement fails to address PC 8465(a)(2), which states that a person who is otherwise ineligible to serve under PC 8402(a)(4) can still nominate a personal representative, and that person would have higher priority for appointment than the person nominated by a sibling.
